subcodes.title: Letter to Jinab-i-Haji Siyyid Javad Karbala'i
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made the ornament of the Tablets of the Morn of Eternity to be as the Alif standing betwixt two Bás, resplendent and illumining after it was originated, ere it was fashioned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی جعل طراز الواح صبح الازل طراز الالف القائم بین البائین فلاحت و اضائت بعد ما بدعت قبل ما اخترعت
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @symbolism, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
